title: SNG & Partners elevates Jahnavi Dwarkadas and Sweta Mehta to Partnership
description: SNG & Partners has announced Annual Promotions. Jahnavi Dwarkadas has been elevated to Partner in the Private Client Practice Group, and Sweta Mehta has been promoted to Partner in the Banking & Finance Practice Group.Further, Lokesh Malik has been elevated as Associate Partner in the Corporate Litigation Practice Group.Lokesh MalikIn addition, the Firm has also made three Principal Associates:Manan Pant | Banking & Finance Practice GroupAyushi Parnami | Corporate & Financial Ser
